programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Treehouse of Horror Special: Milhouse is trapped in another dimension; dead Homer's spirit tries some new bodies on for size; and Selma finds love in an unlikely place!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After a trip to a water park, Lisa's determined to set free Springfield's most vicious captive animals; Homer fulfils a lifelong dream.

programme.title: Live: UFC Fight Night
programme.sub-title: Ufc Fight Night: Burns V Malott
programme.desc: Live coverage of the UFC Fight Night from the Canada Life Centre in Winnipeg, Canada which will feature Brazilian Gilbert Burns taking on Mike Malott from Canada.

programme.title: On Duke Today...
programme.desc: Here's what's on DUKE today.

programme.title: Resto My Ride
programme.desc: All eyes are on this 1939 Chrysler Royal as it arrives out of storage to Resto’s and Rods garage. The Chrysler undergoes a surprise transformation for this client.

programme.title: NZ Hunter Adventures
programme.desc: Greg and Willie split Sika roar teams between the Central North Island’s Kaweka and Kaimanawa forests. With a monster caught on trail camera, will their paths cross?

programme.title: New: Saving Lives At Sea
programme.desc: In Walmer, the crew respond to reports of a major incident involving a small boat in the Channel; on arrival they are faced with mass casualties in the freezing water.

programme.title: New: Hunting Aotearoa
programme.desc: Tiki sets off to Kāpiti and teams up with fit hunters Kane, Tara and family for a pig hunt in the coastal hills.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Marge realises that everyone views her as boring, she takes up competitive lumber-jacking.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Simpsons join other Springfield families on the Van Houtens' annual trip to Costa Rica.

programme.title: New: 24 Hours In Police Custody
programme.desc: The suspect admits to killing Anette. But a deeply disturbing tale that shocks experienced detectives has only just begun.

programme.title: Night Coppers
programme.desc: The coppers break up a mass brawl and tackle some urban explorers up a crane. And an inebriated nuisance neighbour doesn’t want to go to bed.

programme.title: New: Hunting Aotearoa
programme.desc: Tiki sets off to Kāpiti and teams up with fit hunters Kane, Tara and family for a pig hunt in the coastal hills.

programme.title: SAS: Catching The Criminals
programme.desc: Greater Manchester Police make multiple raids on suspected organised crime gangs. Ex-SAS leader Billy Billingham joins the teams searching for ill-gotten gains.

programme.title: I Escaped A Murderer
programme.desc: Two women who escaped killers share their experiences. One survived an attack by serial killer Angel Maturino Resendiz, also known as the 'Railroad Killer'.

programme.title: Duke - Back In The Future
programme.desc: We'll catch you later on DUKE.

programme.title: On Duke Today...
programme.desc: Here's what's on DUKE today.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Marge realises that everyone views her as boring, she takes up competitive lumber-jacking.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Simpsons join other Springfield families on the Van Houtens' annual trip to Costa Rica.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Eddie tries to befriend the only other Chinese kid in school, but he's in for a letdown after he finds out that they have nothing in common. Louis feels betrayed.

programme.title: Mythbusters: There's Your Problem
programme.desc: Can paper only be folded seven times, or is someone bending the truth? The MythBusters investigate whether toilet paper could be a prisoner's ticket to freedom.

programme.title: Mythbusters: There's Your Problem
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered whether the box or the cereal has more nutritional value? Does toast always land buttered side down? And can you really fry shrimp on the fly?

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: As the team chases the trajectory of the stone pathway in the swamp, they discover pieces of an English cannon dating back to nearly a century before the Money Pit.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Chathams Challenge: Farming on the Chatham Islands isn’t for the faint-hearted.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Fruitful Family: a Motueka family spreads its risk across three crops – apples, grapes and kiwifruit.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Trucking disaster strikes on a country road when a 44-tonne truck, loaded with frozen chips, careers into a ditch and ends up resting dangerously on its side.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Season Premiere: A California almond farm serves up a hidden stash of retro surf shop relics, and a Prohibition Era bowling alley in L.A. offers a mind-blowing trip back in time.

programme.title: The Office U.S
programme.desc: Dwight, Andy and Angela tend to unfinished business.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Jessica is happy to learn of Evan's interest in joining the debate team; Eddie and Emery team up to enter a comic book contest.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Simpsons are all forced to face various Thanksgiving nightmares!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Todd, Todd, Why Hast Thou Forsaken Me?
programme.desc: When Todd blames God for the death of his mother and rejects his faith, Ned sends him to live with the Simpsons in an attempt to scare him back to God.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Andy Zaltzman dirties poor Alex Horne’s trousers and Emma Sidi reveals a startling belief regarding socks.

programme.title: Movie: Norbit
programme.desc: In this crazy comedy, a mild-mannered man (Eddie Murphy), who is married to a monstrous woman (also Eddie Murphy!), meets the woman of his dreams, and schemes to find a way to be with her..

programme.title: Twisted Metal
programme.desc: As the tournament kicks off, John and Quiet battle through a grueling qualifying round.

programme.title: Twisted Metal
programme.desc: John and Quiet forge new alliances and rivalries; Sweet Tooth crosses paths with a familiar foe.

programme.title: Duke - Back In The Future
programme.desc: We'll catch you later on DUKE.

programme.desc: Here's what's on DUKE today.
